message:
chore(deps): prune stale dependency versions from Cargo.lock

Remove unused transitive dependency entries that accumulated in the lock
file. Notable removals include aws-lc-rs/aws-lc-sys (no longer pulled
in by any direct dependency), older windows-sys crate versions (0.42.x
superseded by 0.48.x+), jni/jni-sys (Java interop not needed), and
several other stale entries. This keeps the lock file in sync with the
current dependency graph after recent Cargo.toml changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
